title: Open project by phone lookup and resume the saved step
description: Verifies a customer can look up a project by phone number and is redirected into the correct project flow at its current saved section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill +34612345678 into the phone number field
Submit the phone lookup
Verify the user is redirected into a project session with a code in the URL and the current section content is displayed

title: Log in to dashboard and view submitted projects list
description: Assessor can log in with the dashboard password and see the list of submitted projects.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with eltex2025
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard shows a list of submitted projects

title: Submit a completed project from the review section
description: This test verifies a customer can submit from the review section and sees the success confirmation screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250005
Click to submit the project from the review section
Verify a success confirmation screen is shown

title: Fix an incomplete item from review and return to submit
description: This test verifies a customer can navigate from review to fix an incomplete item, return to review, and then submit successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the option to defer signing
Click to continue from the representation step
From the next section, navigate to the review section through the app's continue controls
Click an incomplete checklist item to return to the representation step
Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature()
Click to continue from the representation step
From subsequent sections, continue until the review section is shown again
Click to submit the project from the review section
Verify a success confirmation screen is shown

title: Open a submitted project details modal and review extracted data and previews
description: Assessor can open a project's details and see uploaded document previews and extracted data in the modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with eltex2025
Submit the login form
Open a project detail view from the projects list
Verify the project detail modal is displayed
Verify uploaded document previews and extracted data are displayed in the modal

title: Complete property document uploads and continue to province selection
description: Verifies a customer can upload required documents, review extracted fields, and proceed to the province selection section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Upload a valid DNI/NIE front image
Confirm the reviewed extracted DNI/NIE details
Upload a valid DNI/NIE back image if the flow prompts for it
Upload a valid IBI certificate file
Upload a valid electricity bill file with multiple pages if supported by the picker
Click the continue control for property documents
Verify the province selection section is displayed

title: Download project ZIP from project details
description: Assessor can download the full project ZIP package from a project's detail modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with eltex2025
Submit the login form
Open a project detail view from the projects list
Start the download of the full project ZIP
Verify the browser starts a file download

title: Sign all required representation documents and continue
description: This test verifies a customer can provide a valid signature for the required representation PDFs and successfully advance to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature()
Click to continue from the representation step
Verify the app advances past the representation step to the next section

title: Download an individual uploaded asset from project details
description: Assessor can download an individual asset from within a project's detail modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with eltex2025
Submit the login form
Open a project detail view from the projects list
Click the download control for an individual asset
Verify the browser starts a file download

title: Select Cataluña and proceed to representation signing
description: Verifies a customer can select Cataluña as province (when not auto-detected) and continue to the representation section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
Click the control to select a province if the list is not already open
Select Cataluña from the province list
Click the province continue control
Verify the representation signing section is displayed

title: Review checklist is visible and summarizes completion state
description: This test verifies the review section displays a checklist summarizing the project’s required items and their statuses.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250005
Verify the review checklist is displayed with item status indicators

title: Export submitted projects list as CSV
description: Assessor can export the projects list as a CSV file from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with eltex2025
Submit the login form
Start the export of the projects list as CSV
Verify the browser starts a file download

title: Select Madrid and proceed to representation signing
description: Verifies a customer can select Madrid as province (when not auto-detected) and continue to the representation section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
Click the control to select a province if the list is not already open
Select Madrid from the province list
Click the province continue control
Verify the representation signing section is displayed

title: Log out returns to dashboard login screen
description: Assessor can log out and is returned to the dashboard login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with eltex2025
Submit the login form
Log out from the dashboard
Verify the dashboard login screen is displayed

title: Defer representation signing and continue
description: This test verifies a customer can defer signing representation documents and still advance to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the option to defer signing
Click to continue from the representation step
Verify the app advances past the representation step to the next section

title: Block continuing when required property documents are missing
description: Verifies the customer cannot proceed if required property documents have not been provided and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Click the continue control for property documents
Verify validation errors are visible for missing required documents

title: Skip the entire energy certificate survey
description: This test verifies a customer can skip the energy certificate survey and is taken to the review section with the survey marked as skipped.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Click to skip the entire energy certificate survey
Verify the app advances to the review section

title: Require DNI/NIE back image before continuing when only front is provided
description: Verifies attempting to continue after uploading only the DNI/NIE front is blocked until the back image is uploaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Upload a valid DNI/NIE front image
Confirm the reviewed extracted DNI/NIE details
Click the continue control for property documents
Verify a validation error indicates the DNI/NIE back image is required
Upload a valid DNI/NIE back image
Click the continue control for property documents
Verify the province selection section is displayed

title: Complete the energy certificate survey across all four steps
description: This test verifies a customer can complete all four energy certificate steps and reach the review section marked as complete.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Fill the required housing data fields for step 1 with valid values
Click next to go to step 2
Fill the required openings and window fields for step 2 with valid values
Click next to go to step 3
Fill the required thermal systems fields for step 3 with valid values
Click next to go to step 4
Fill the required final info fields for step 4 with valid values
Confirm completion of the energy certificate survey
Verify the app advances to the review section

title: Proceed when province is already auto-detected
description: Verifies that when a province is already detected and selection is hidden, the customer can still continue to representation signing.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
Wait for the province selection section to finish loading any prefilled state
Click the province continue control
Verify the representation signing section is displayed

title: Incorrect dashboard password blocks access
description: Assessor entering an incorrect password cannot access the dashboard and sees a login error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is displayed and the dashboard content is not shown

title: Return to property documents using the province back control
description: Verifies a customer can navigate back from province selection to the property document upload section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
Click the province back control
Verify the property document upload section is displayed

title: Prevent continuing without a signature
description: This test verifies the customer cannot continue from representation signing until a valid signature is provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Attempt to continue from the representation step without signing
Verify the app remains on the representation step

title: Prevent lookup submission with an invalid phone format
description: Verifies the phone lookup form blocks submission when the phone number format is invalid and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 123 into the phone number field
Submit the phone lookup
Verify a phone number validation error is visible

title: Navigate back and forward within the energy certificate steps
description: This test verifies a customer can move forward and back between energy certificate steps without losing the ability to continue.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Fill the required fields on step 1 with valid values
Click next to go to step 2
Click back to return to step 1
Click next to go to step 2 again
Verify the user is on step 2 and can proceed

title: Show not-found error for unknown phone number
description: Verifies submitting an unknown phone number shows a not-found error and the user remains on the phone entry step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill +34600000000 into the phone number field
Submit the phone lookup
Verify a phone lookup error is visible and the phone entry step remains displayed

title: Block confirming the energy certificate when required fields are missing
description: This test verifies the survey cannot be confirmed on the final step until required inputs are provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Fill the required fields on step 1 with valid values
Click next to go to step 2
Fill the required fields on step 2 with valid values
Click next to go to step 3
Fill the required fields on step 3 with valid values
Click next to go to step 4
Attempt to confirm completion without filling the required fields on step 4
Verify a validation error is visible and the app remains on the energy certificate section
